record.summary: The hiqlite runtime embedded in the Node process: a napi-rs cdylib (@enrahitu/hiqlite-native) exposing init/health, TTL'd KV, and counters, plus the thin `hiq` Encore service that starts the node at service load and fronts the addon over HTTP. Replaces Redis for cache and rate-limit state with zero extra processes.
record.title: In-process hiqlite via a napi-rs native addon
